prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HD16DDRS-17PC-MED-BL Product Type: PRECISION_MEASURING Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Heavy Duty Ring Tool 16 Dies DIY Stretcher and Enlarger Description: Have a few rings that you would love to wear but they're just too small? Or want to give a ring to a special someone but it isn't the right size? This Heavy Duty 16 Die Ring Stretcher Tool is the perfect solution to your jewelry making problems.

The Heavy Duty Ring Stretcher and Enlarger Tool comes with 16 dies in different sizes to shape your rings. Simply screw the die of your choosing onto the front of the ring stretcher and twist at the top to begin expanding your rings. This device is easy to carry around and can be stored virtually anywhere.

Don't be held back from wearing your favorite rings because of their size. This Heavy Duty Ring Stretcher with 16 Dies will be able to accommodate to any ring size so you can begin wearing your most precious jewelry. Search Terms: ring stretcher jewelry enlarger stretching tools hobby Features: - Heavy Duty 16 Dies DIY Ring Tool Stretcher and Enlarger for Jewelry Making and Adjusting - 16 Dies of Multiple Different Sized to Accommodate to Any Ring Size - Perfect for Expanding Rings that are Too Small - Simply Choose the Right Size Die and Screw Onto the Front of the Ring Stretcher - Easy to Carry Around and Can be Stored Virtually Anywhere === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
